name: We All Lie
overview: Renowned screenwriter Su Li's seemingly perfect marriage to popular actor Zhang Shuheng starts to unravel after she receives an anonymous message hinting at betrayal. As she navigates the emotional turmoil, Su Li forms an unexpected friendship with someone who shares her struggles, leading to a story of resilience and newfound strength.

trailers.title: We All Lie【婚姻攻略】Trailer  | 优酷 YOUKU
